CustomField.description: Personalised donation URL for this Contact. Embeds ulbc_trust_id parameter so the Stripe webhook can match the payment back to this Contact. Use as a merge field in Salesforce email templates: {!Contact.ULBC_Donation_Link__c}. Base URL stored in ULBC_Stripe_Settings__c custom setting (Decision 5.15).
CustomField.label: Donation Link
